name: Meridian
legalNameNote: Marketing name for the MeridianPSI product family: the NinjaTrader 8 add-on, and the standalone Meridian apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts (early access).
tagline: Complete risk management for serious futures traders — every limit, plus the behavioral layer none of them have
description: Meridian is the complete risk manager for serious futures traders: every traditional limit a risk tool has — daily loss, P&L and drawdown caps, single-trade loss caps, loss-streak cutoff — plus a real-time behavioral layer that tracks seven trading behaviors and computes a live PSI score on your machine. Native in NinjaTrader 8 today; standalone apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts in early access.

platforms.name: NinjaTrader 8
platforms.delivery: Native add-on — installs inside NinjaTrader 8 (Tools → Import → NinjaScript Add-On)

platforms.name: Tradovate
platforms.delivery: Standalone Windows app — connects directly to your Tradovate account. No NinjaTrader required.

platforms.name: Ironbeam
platforms.delivery: Standalone Windows app — connects directly to your Ironbeam account. No NinjaTrader required.

systemRequirements.ninjaTrader: NinjaTrader 8 — we recommend the latest stable build from NinjaTrader
systemRequirements.note: Older NinjaTrader 8 builds may work but are not guaranteed. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported. The standalone Tradovate and Ironbeam apps (early access) do not require NinjaTrader.
